headline: High-End Residential Design Preparation Checklist — Alhambra
articleBody:
High-End Residential Design Preparation Checklist for Alhambra Clients

Before your High-End Residential Design appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
